evidence_family: reference regression and wire transcript evidence
required_retained_artifacts: commands logs normalized outputs hashes reference version tool version protocol version generated fixture version and redaction manifest
forbidden_evidence: local-only paths raw secrets unnormalized reference transcripts hand-edited expected outputs

evidence_family: crash recovery soak performance and live migration evidence
required_retained_artifacts: crash dumps restart logs MGA recovery summaries soak duration resource metrics performance raw and summarized results live migration phases and support bundles
forbidden_evidence: manual notes non-reproducible runs reference-engine-only pass evidence parser-owned finality claims

evidence_family: security packaging documentation support and independent audit evidence
required_retained_artifacts: security findings closure package manifests hashes signatures docs support runbooks support bundle outputs audit report and zero-open finding ledger
forbidden_evidence: self-audit-only closure stale documentation unsigned package evidence unresolved support issues
